documentation: Define and send PTP motion command into buffer for execution. Data format combines three letters: #1 Motion target (C=Cartesian, J=Joint), #2 Speed format (P=percentage), #3 Blending format (P=percentage).
int[] | None: Pose configuration [Config1, Config2, Config3]
Define and send PTP relative motion commands for execution. Data format: #1 Relative target (C=current base, T=tool, J=joint), #2 Speed (P=percentage), #3 Blending (P=percentage).

Define and send Line motion command into buffer for execution. Data format: #1 Target (C=Cartesian), #2 Speed (P=percentage, A=absolute sync, D=absolute no sync), #3 Blending (P=percentage, R=radius).
int | None: Singularity handling (0=disable, 1=path avoidance, 2=speed change)

Define and send PLine motion command into buffer for execution. Data format: #1 Target (J=joint, C=Cartesian), #2 Speed (A/D), #3 Blending (P=percentage).
Define and send PLine relative motion commands for execution. Data format: #1 Relative target, #2 Speed (A/D), #3 Blending (P=percentage).

Read the CC-Link input table content and convert data to 32-bit floating-point. Conversion: 0=Little-Endian, 1=Big-Endian, 2=Based on config file.
Read the CC-Link input table content and convert data to UTF8 string (ending with 0x00).
Read the CC-Link input table content and retrieve the nth bit value. Returns 1 for bit=1, 0 for bit=0. Bit data returned as byte array.
int | None: Amount of bits to read
signatures: int - Amount of bits to read
int - Amount of bits to read

documentation: Read the CC-Link output table content. Return type depends on item definition (byte, byte[], int, int[], float, float[], string).
int | None: Amount of addresses to read
signatures: int - Amount of addresses to read

documentation: Read the CC-Link output table content and convert data to 16-bit integer. Conversion: 0=Little-Endian, 1=Big-Endian, 2=Based on config file.
Read the CC-Link output table content and convert data to 32-bit integer. Conversion: 0=Little-Endian, 1=Big-Endian, 2=Based on config file.
Read the CC-Link output table content and convert data to 32-bit floating-point. Conversion: 0=Little-Endian, 1=Big-Endian, 2=Based on config file.
Read the CC-Link output table content and convert data to UTF8 string (ending with 0x00).
Read the CC-Link output table content and retrieve the nth bit value. Returns 1 for bit=1, 0 for bit=0. Bit data returned as byte array.
int | None: Amount of bits to read
signatures: int - Amount of bits to read
int - Amount of bits to read

documentation: Write data to the CC-Link output table. Available data types: byte, byte[], int, int[], float, float[], string. Returns true on success, false if data is empty or send/receive fails.
int | None: Starting address of data,
signatures: int - Max address amount to write
int - Amount of addresses to write

documentation: Write content to the nth bit value of the data byte in the CC-Link output table. Bit value=1 for byte>=1, bit value=0 for byte==0.
int | None: Starting bit to write data,
int | None: Amount of bits to write
signatures: int - Starting bit to write data
int - Amount of bits to write
int - Starting bit to write data
int - Starting bit to write data
int - Amount of bits to write
int - Starting bit to write data
